Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus B45 Timings - Prison to Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North

October 3, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system provides an efficient and affordable way to traverse the city and its suburbs. Among its many routes, Bus B45 connects the Prison to Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North, facilitating access to essential services, shopping, and community areas.

Operational Details

Bus B45 operates consistently throughout the day, ensuring reliable service for passengers. Below are the key timings for Bus B45 departing from both the Prison and Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North:

From Prison From Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North
05:38 06:38
07:37 08:37
09:37 10:37
11:37 12:36
13:39 14:36
15:37 16:37
17:37 18:36
19:37 20:35
21:37 22:38

Download PDF Bus B45

Bus B45 Timetable

For the full schedule, visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for the B45 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Fares for Bus B45 are paid using the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare for travel within one zone is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can easily top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks around the city for a seamless, cash-free experience.

Route Overview

Here is the complete list of stops along this route:

  1. Prison The starting point for passengers.

  2. Lane 2003, Souq A vibrant marketplace with local vendors.

  3. Al Rahman Mosque A significant religious site in the community.

  4. Farmer’s Market A popular destination for fresh produce.

  5. Al Asqa’ Street A street lined with local amenities.

  6. Baniyas Court A key judicial location.

  7. Al Wathba Mosque An important mosque for local residents.

  8. Veterinary Hospital A facility offering essential pet care services.

  9. Maryam Bint Omran School An educational institution for local children.

  10. Souq A bustling market offering a variety of goods.

  11. Taxi Station A hub for taxi services.

  12. Baniyas Cooperative Society A grocery store for daily essentials.

  13. Suhaila Rashid Al Rumaithi Mosque A local mosque.

  14. Hamza Bin Abdulmotalab Secondary School Serving older students.

  15. Municipal Market A center for shopping and community interaction.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Salama Bint Butti School An educational facility for young learners.

  2. Street 14 A residential area with local access.

  3. Public Emergency & Safety Department Providing vital services.

  4. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall South A popular shopping destination.

  5. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North The final stop, offering diverse shopping and entertainment options.

Accessibility and Services

Bus B45 is designed to accommodate passengers with special needs, featuring:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for individuals with mobility issues.
  • Audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments.

This inclusivity ensures that Bus B45 is a comfortable option for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Passengers traveling on Bus B45 can access several key attractions and landmarks:

  1. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall A major shopping center with a variety of stores and dining options.

2.

3.

Journey Experience

The B45 bus from Prison to Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North offers an engaging ride through Abu Dhabi’s vibrant neighborhoods. Departing from Lane 2003 Souq, the bus passes the Al Rahman Mosque, a stunning spiritual landmark, and the local Farmer’s Market, where fresh produce awaits. Educational spots like Maryam Bint Omran School showcase the community’s commitment to learning.

As it approaches the mall, passengers can enjoy views of the lush greenery around Al Wathba Mosque and the bustling Municipal Market. This route not only connects essential points but also highlights Abu Dhabi’s charm and cultural richness, making for a memorable travel experience.

Travel Tips for Bus B45

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to minimize waiting times, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick and cashless payments on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Utilize the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to enhance your travel experience.
  • Avoid Peak Times: For a quieter ride, try to travel outside of the busiest morning and afternoon periods.

Bus B45 offers a dependable and convenient option for traveling between the Prison and Bawabat Al Sharq Mall North.

Whether you’re commuting to work, shopping, or participating in community events, this bus guarantees a smooth and budget-friendly journey. Step aboard Bus B45 and effortlessly discover the vibrant neighborhoods of Abu Dhabi! Don’t forget to check out the complete list of bus routes available in Abu Dhabi for more travel options!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 3, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
